headline: Bernstein cuts food giants as GLP-1s, health trends threaten growth outlooks
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein turned more cautious on the U.S. packaged food sector, downgrading several industry heavyweights as it warned that structural headwinds ranging from rising GLP-1 drug adoption to regulatory scrutiny and shifting consumer preferences are likely to pressure growth and profitability for years to come.

headline: Bernstein Downgrades The Campbell's to Underperform, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: Bernstein  analyst Alexia Howard   downgrades The Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) from Market Perform to Underperform and lowers the price target from $21 to $19.

headline: Tomato Prices Are Spiking, and These 2 Food Stocks Could Feel the Squeeze
summary: Tomato prices rose nearly 40% year-over-year to $2.69 per pound in April, pressuring Campbell's (CPB) and Conagra (CAG), both of which are already facing margin headwinds.
